title: exbucklandia tonkinensis
intro: Exbucklandia tonkinensis, also known as the Tonkin exbucklandia or Exbucklandia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Exbucklandia tonkinensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. Exbucklandia tonkinensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
